'''fashudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngoma|ngoma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngoma|ngoma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fashudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæshidith|fæshidith]] || [[word:fæshidij|fæshidij]] || [[word:fæshidish|fæshidish]] || [[word:fæshidi|fæshidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashushuduth|fashushuduth]] || [[word:fashushuduj|fashushuduj]] || [[word:fashushudush|fashushudush]] || [[word:fashushudu|fashushudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashuduth|fashuduth]] || [[word:fashuduj|fashuduj]] || [[word:fashudush|fashudush]] || [[word:fashudu|fashudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashufduth|fashufduth]] || [[word:fashufduj|fashufduj]] || [[word:fashufdush|fashufdush]] || [[word:fashufduf|fashufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fashuduthu|fashuduthu]] || [[word:fashuduju|fashuduju]] || [[word:fashudushu|fashudushu]] || [[word:fashuduku|fashuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fashuduth|fashuduth]] || [[word:fashuduj|fashuduj]] || [[word:fashudush|fashudush]] || [[word:fashudu|fashudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fashuduthul|fashuduthul]] || [[word:fashudujul|fashudujul]] || [[word:fashudushul|fashudushul]] || [[word:fashudukul|fashudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fashuduthuthu|fashuduthuthu]] || [[word:fashudujuju|fashudujuju]] || [[word:fashudushushu|fashudushushu]] || [[word:fashuduku|fashuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fashuduthun|fashuduthun]] || [[word:fashudujun|fashudujun]] || [[word:fashudushun|fashudushun]] || [[word:fashudukun|fashudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fashuduthuoro|fashuduthuoro]] || [[word:fashudujuoro|fashudujuoro]] || [[word:fashudushuoro|fashudushuoro]] || [[word:fashudukuoro|fashudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
